summary.zh: 1900年的世界由全球性帝国、殖民行政区、王国、共和国与部族政体共同构成；列强在欧亚非扩张至顶峰，中国正值八国联军入侵前后，非洲与东南亚多地已被殖民统治，但仍有若干独立君主国、共和国与边疆部族政治体并存。
summary.en: In 1900, the world was shaped by global empires, colonial administrations, kingdoms, republics, and tribal polities; great powers stood near their imperial zenith, China faced the Eight-Nation Alliance crisis, and much of Africa and Southeast Asia had fallen under colonial rule, though several independent monarchies, republics, and frontier polities still persisted.

governmentForm.zh: 君主专制下的近代化帝国，形式上中央集权，实际上受列强干预
governmentForm.en: Modernizing empire under an absolute monarchy, formally centralized but increasingly constrained by foreign powers

socialStructure.zh: 社会以皇室与两班官僚地主为上层，中央与地方官吏、军官和新式学堂出身者构成新兴中层，城市商人、手工业者与广大自耕农和佃农为主体，另有贱民制度残余虽已法理废除但社会歧视犹存
socialStructure.en: Society was headed by the imperial house and the yangban bureaucratic-landed elite; a growing middle stratum included officials, officers, and graduates of modern schools; merchants, artisans, and the broad mass of owner-cultivators and tenants formed the majority, while remnants of the former outcaste order survived socially despite legal abolition

rulingClass.zh: 皇室、两班官僚、亲皇室改革派大臣以及掌握财政与军政要职的宫廷近臣
rulingClass.en: The imperial family, the yangban bureaucracy, pro-imperial reform ministers, and court favorites holding key fiscal and military offices

succession.zh: 李氏王室父系世袭，通常由皇帝嫡系男性继承，必要时由宗室近支承统
succession.en: Patrilineal hereditary succession within the House of Yi, normally through the emperor’s direct male line, with collateral royal branches eligible if necessary

structure.zh: 以皇帝为最高统治者，宫内府与议政府并行，中央设各部处理内政、财政、军务、法务、外务与宫廷事务；地方行政经由府、郡、县体系推行，但中央对地方控制力因财政不足与外来压力而削弱
structure.en: The emperor stood at the apex of rule, with the Imperial Household and State Council operating in parallel; central ministries handled internal affairs, finance, military affairs, justice, foreign affairs, and court administration. Provincial administration ran through prefectural and county hierarchies, though central control was weakened by fiscal strain and foreign pressure

function.zh: 管理皇室财产、宫廷礼仪、侍从机构及皇帝直属事务，并通过宫廷网络影响人事与财政
function.en: Managed imperial property, court ritual, attendants, and matters directly attached to the emperor, while influencing appointments and finance through palace networks

function.zh: 统筹政务协调、皇命传达与各部之间的政策整合，是名义上的最高行政中枢
function.en: Coordinated state administration, transmitted imperial orders, and integrated policy across ministries, serving nominally as the highest administrative center

function.zh: 管理地方行政、户籍、警务、土木、卫生与部分经济监管事务
function.en: Oversaw local administration, household registration, police, public works, sanitation, and parts of economic regulation

function.zh: 负责税收、预算、国库、货币、海关收入分配与国家债务
function.en: Handled taxation, budgets, the treasury, currency, allocation of customs revenues, and state debt

function.zh: 管理陆军编制、军官任命、军械采购、要塞与训练
function.en: Managed army organization, officer appointments, armaments procurement, fortifications, and training

function.zh: 主管司法审判、监狱、法典修订与现代法律制度推行
function.en: Supervised courts, prisons, legal codification, and the introduction of modern judicial institutions

function.zh: 处理与日本、俄国、清朝后继关系国及西方列强的条约、使节与通商事务
function.en: Managed treaties, legations, and commercial relations with Japan, Russia, the successor states to Qing suzerainty, and the Western powers

function.zh: 管理新式学校、教材、留学事务与教育近代化
function.en: Oversaw modern schools, curricula, study abroad, and educational modernization

name.en: Ministry of Agriculture, Commerce, and Industry

function.zh: 负责农业改良、商业管理、矿业、轻工业及近代企业扶植
function.en: Handled agricultural improvement, commercial regulation, mining, light industry, and support for modern enterprise

function.zh: 维持京城与主要城市治安，监控政治活动，并在外国顾问影响下推行近代警察制度
function.en: Maintained order in the capital and major cities, monitored political activity, and developed modern policing under foreign advisory influence

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为若干道，以下为府、郡、县与面里等级；地方官由中央任命，但地方豪强、旧两班网络及外国势力在港口、矿区和铁路沿线拥有实际影响力
localAdmin.en: The realm was divided into provinces, below which stood prefectures, counties, and township-village units; local magistrates were appointed by the center, but local strongmen, old yangban networks, and foreign interests wielded real influence in ports, mining districts, and railway corridors

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系处于由传统朝鲜王朝律令向近代成文法转型阶段，保留儒家纲常影响，同时设近代法院、警察与监狱制度；治外法权严重限制司法主权
legalSystem.en: The legal system was in transition from traditional Choson statutes to modern codified law, retaining Confucian moral influence while building modern courts, police, and prisons; extraterritorial privileges severely limited judicial sovereignty

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以地税为核心，辅以户税、商业税、关税、盐税、矿业与专卖收入；征收效率不稳，地方盘剥、逃税和列强控制海关收入削弱国家财政
taxationSystem.en: Taxation centered on the land tax, supplemented by household levies, commercial taxes, customs duties, salt taxes, mining income, and monopoly revenues; collection was uneven, while local exactions, evasion, and foreign control over customs weakened state finances

religion.zh: 以儒教国家礼制为主导，民间广泛信奉佛教、巫俗与地方信仰，天主教与新教传播迅速并在教育医疗领域影响扩大
religion.en: Confucian state ritual remained dominant, while Buddhism, shamanic practice, and local cults were widespread among the population; Catholicism and Protestantism were spreading rapidly and expanding their influence through education and medicine

philosophy.zh: 主流思想仍为朱子学与忠孝纲常，但甲午后改革与独立协会社群推动开化思想、立宪观念、实学传统复兴及民族自强意识
philosophy.en: Neo-Confucian orthodoxy and the ethics of loyalty and filiality remained influential, but after the 1890s reformers and independence activists promoted enlightenment ideas, constitutional thought, a revival of practical learning, and a growing sense of national self-strengthening

writingSystem.zh: 官方文书仍多用汉文，但谚文即韩文的行政与教育使用显著增加，形成汉文、国汉文混用与纯韩文并存局面
writingSystem.en: Classical Chinese remained common in official documentation, but the use of vernacular Korean script expanded markedly in administration and education, producing a mixed environment of Classical Chinese, mixed script, and pure Hangul

culturalAchievements.zh: 近代报刊、国文出版、爱国启蒙文学、新式学校、宫廷摄影与西式军乐逐渐兴起；同时保留宫廷礼乐、书画、金属工艺、瓷器与传统医学等深厚遗产
culturalAchievements.en: Modern newspapers, vernacular publishing, patriotic enlightenment literature, modern schools, court photography, and Western-style military music were emerging; at the same time the empire preserved deep traditions in court music, calligraphy and painting, metalwork, ceramics, and classical medicine

languageFamily.zh: 朝鲜语属朝鲜语系，书面文化长期深受汉字文化圈影响
languageFamily.en: Korean belongs to the Koreanic language family, while its written culture had long been deeply shaped by the wider Sinitic sphere

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年前后的大韩帝国经济以农业为绝对主体，稻米与杂粮生产支撑人口生计，手工业与区域市场广泛存在，但工业化仍处起步阶段。铁路、电报、港口贸易和少量矿业开发带来近代部门增长，整体经济规模在东亚中属中等偏低，受财政紊乱、外债、外国商权与政治不稳拖累
gdpDescription.en: Around 1900 the Korean Empire’s economy remained overwhelmingly agrarian, with rice and grain production sustaining the population and widespread handicrafts and regional markets. Railways, telegraph lines, port trade, and limited mining created small modern sectors, but industrialization was still in its infancy. Overall economic scale was modest by East Asian standards and burdened by fiscal disorder, foreign debt, extraterritorial commercial privileges, and political instability

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻与杂粮农业、棉麻纺织、手工织布、陶瓷、造纸、人参种植与加工、渔业、盐业、金矿与煤矿开采、港口贸易与运输
mainIndustries.en: Rice and grain agriculture, cotton and hemp textiles, hand weaving, ceramics, papermaking, ginseng cultivation and processing, fisheries, salt production, gold and coal mining, and port commerce and transport

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以大米、豆类、人参、金、牛皮、海产品为主；进口以棉纱棉布、机械、煤油、金属制品、军火、纸张、糖与奢侈消费品为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports included rice, beans, ginseng, gold, hides, and marine products; imports included cotton yarn and cloth, machinery, kerosene, metal goods, arms, paper, sugar, and luxury consumer products

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异较大。乡村地主与部分两班家族拥有土地、粮仓与租佃收益，城市商人和与外国贸易相关者积累现金财富，而广大农户资产有限，常受赋役、债务与歉收冲击
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Rural landlords and some yangban families held land, granaries, and rental income; urban merchants and those connected to foreign trade accumulated cash wealth; the majority of peasant households possessed little and were vulnerable to taxes, debt, and poor harvests

economicSystem.zh: 以小农农业和地方市场为基础的前工业经济，叠加国家主导的有限近代化、特许商权、外资渗透与条约口岸贸易
economicSystem.en: A preindustrial economy based on peasant agriculture and local markets, overlaid with limited state-led modernization, concessionary commerce, foreign capital penetration, and treaty-port trade

source.en: Posts, telegraphs, railways, and state enterprises

category.en: Debt service, indemnities, and foreign obligations

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库存银与硬币储备有限，且部分收入已被预支、质押或受外国银行和海关安排影响。宫廷私库与国家公库界限并不总是清晰，削弱了财政透明度
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury reserves in bullion and coin were limited, and part of expected revenue was already advanced, pledged, or constrained by foreign banks and customs arrangements. The boundary between the imperial household’s private funds and the state treasury was not always clear, reducing fiscal transparency

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持宫廷、军队与基本国家机器运转为首要目标，尝试推行币制、税制与预算改革，但因派系斗争、征收薄弱和列强压力而成效有限，长期呈赤字倾向
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized sustaining the court, the army, and the basic machinery of state. Monetary, tax, and budgetary reforms were attempted, but factional conflict, weak collection, and great-power pressure limited success, producing a chronic deficit tendency

name.zh: 近卫步兵与京城守备队

description.zh: 驻守首都与宫廷周边，承担皇室警卫、首都治安与政变防范任务，装备与待遇通常优于一般部队
description.en: Stationed in and around the capital, these troops guarded the imperial family, maintained urban security, and protected against coups; they were usually better equipped and paid than ordinary units

description.zh: 分驻各地的主力陆军，负责地方秩序、沿海防务与战时动员，但训练、军纪与补给参差不齐
description.en: The main provincial army, dispersed across the country for local order, coastal defense, and wartime mobilization, though training, discipline, and supply were uneven

description.zh: 规模不大，多用于传令、巡逻、镇压骚乱与护卫交通线
description.en: Small in number, used mainly for dispatch, patrol, suppression of unrest, and protection of communications

description.zh: 装备若干近代火炮，部署于首都、要塞与沿海据点，但弹药储备与训练不足
description.en: Equipped with a number of modern guns and deployed around the capital, fortifications, and coastal positions, but hampered by insufficient ammunition and training

description.zh: 海军力量极弱，主要承担港口巡逻、训练和象征性海防，难以对抗日本或俄国舰队
description.en: Naval strength was very weak, serving mainly for port patrol, training, and symbolic coastal defense; it could not seriously oppose Japanese or Russian fleets

description.zh: 由退伍军人、地方编练队与临时动员人员构成，战斗力有限
description.en: Composed of veterans, local drilled units, and temporarily mobilized men, with limited combat effectiveness

commanderInChief.zh: 大韩皇帝高宗
commanderInChief.en: Emperor Gojong of Korea

technology.zh: 步兵主要装备后装步枪，炮兵拥有有限近代火炮；电报、铁路与西式操典已引入，但后勤、军工、海军舰艇、参谋制度与军官教育仍明显落后于日本与俄国
technology.en: Infantry were primarily armed with breech-loading rifles and artillery included a limited number of modern guns; telegraphy, railways, and Western drill had been introduced, but logistics, arms production, naval vessels, staff organization, and officer education remained clearly behind Japan and Russia

threats.zh: 最大威胁来自日本对朝鲜内政、财政与军队的持续渗透，其次是俄国在东北亚的扩张与列强在条约、矿权、铁路和港口上的竞争。国内亦有政变、农民骚动与地方失序风险
threats.en: The principal threat came from Japan’s deepening penetration of Korean politics, finance, and the military, followed by Russian expansion in Northeast Asia and wider great-power competition over treaties, mines, railways, and ports. Internally, coups, peasant unrest, and local disorder also posed risks

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千七百万，绝大多数居住于农村，集中在农业生产条件较好的西部、南部平原及河谷地区。人口增长对土地形成压力，部分地区佃农化与流民化趋势加重
populationDescription.en: The population was about 17 million, with an overwhelming rural majority concentrated in the more fertile western and southern plains and river valleys. Population growth increased pressure on land, and tenancy and displacement were worsening in some areas

socialClasses.zh: 上层为皇室与两班；中层包括官吏、军官、教师、译员、商人及新式知识分子；下层为自耕农、佃农、手工业者、渔民、矿工和城市贫民。虽然身份制度在法律上趋于废除，但传统等级与门第观念仍深刻影响婚姻、仕途与社会交往
socialClasses.en: The upper stratum consisted of the imperial house and the yangban; middle groups included officials, officers, teachers, interpreters, merchants, and modern intellectuals; lower groups comprised owner-farmers, tenants, artisans, fishermen, miners, and the urban poor. Although legal status distinctions were being dismantled, older ideas of rank and pedigree still strongly shaped marriage, office-holding, and social interaction

allies.zh: 无可靠正式盟友；朝廷在外交上时而依靠俄国牵制日本，时而寻求美国及若干欧洲列强的道义支持，但均不足以构成安全保障
allies.en: No reliable formal allies; the court at times leaned on Russia to counterbalance Japan and at times sought moral backing from the United States and several European powers, but none provided genuine security guarantees

enemies.zh: 官方上并无公开宣战对象，但日本是最直接且最危险的压迫力量；俄国虽一度被视为制衡者，其势力扩张同样威胁主权，此外列强普遍以不平等条约削弱帝国自主
enemies.en: Officially the empire was not openly at war with any state, but Japan was the most direct and dangerous coercive power; Russia, though sometimes seen as a counterweight, also threatened sovereignty through expansion, while the great powers generally weakened autonomy through unequal treaties

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以在列强竞争间维持名义独立为核心，试图通过多边平衡、签订条约、派遣使节、引入顾问与有限改革保存主权，但由于军事与财政薄弱，实际主动权日益丧失
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving nominal independence amid great-power rivalry, using multilateral balancing, treaties, diplomatic missions, foreign advisers, and limited reform to defend sovereignty; however, weak military and fiscal capacity meant the empire was steadily losing real freedom of action

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路、电报、近代邮政、西式军训、近代医院、活字报刊、摄影、煤矿与金矿机械化开采以及新式学校教育在城市和战略地区逐步推进，但全国普及程度有限
keyInnovations.en: Railways, telegraphy, a modern postal service, Western military drill, modern hospitals, movable-type newspapers, photography, mechanized coal and gold mining, and modern school education were advancing in cities and strategic regions, though national diffusion remained limited

strengths.zh: 拥有较大人口基础、稳固的稻作农业、深厚的文治传统和日益觉醒的民族意识；地处东北亚海陆要冲，若能完成财政、军事与行政改革，具备建设近代国家的潜力
strengths.en: The empire possessed a substantial population base, stable rice agriculture, a deep civil tradition, and a growing national consciousness. Situated at a strategic crossroads in Northeast Asia, it had genuine potential for modern state-building if fiscal, military, and administrative reforms could be completed

weaknesses.zh: 国家机器财政匮乏、中央权威脆弱、宫廷派系斗争激烈、军队现代化不足，且海关、矿权、铁路与外交空间不断遭列强侵蚀；面对日本尤其缺乏有效制衡手段
weaknesses.en: The state apparatus was fiscally weak, central authority fragile, court factionalism intense, and military modernization insufficient. Customs, mining rights, railways, and diplomatic room for maneuver were steadily eroded by foreign powers; against Japan in particular, the empire lacked effective means of resistance

outlook.zh: 1900年的大韩帝国前景黯淡。若无强有力且持续的内部改革与外部安全支持，其名义独立很可能在数年内进一步丧失，并沦为更强邻国的保护国或直接控制对象
outlook.en: The outlook for the Korean Empire in 1900 was bleak. Without strong and sustained internal reform together with external security support, its nominal independence was likely to erode further within a few years, leaving it vulnerable to protectorate status or direct control by a stronger neighbor

description.zh: 名义独立的朝鲜半岛帝国，正受到日本、俄国等列强强烈挤压。
description.en: A nominally independent Korean empire increasingly pressured by Japan, Russia, and other great powers.

ruler.zh: 阿萨夫·贾六世米尔·马赫布布·阿里·汗
ruler.en: Asaf Jah VI Mir Mahbub Ali Khan

governmentForm.zh: 受英国宗主权约束、拥有广泛内政自治权的世袭君主制土邦
governmentForm.en: A hereditary princely monarchy under British paramountcy with broad internal autonomy

socialStructure.zh: 社会呈高度分层，由宫廷贵族、贾吉尔封地持有者、宗教精英、城市商人、手工业者、农民与土地劳役群体组成；城乡并存，语言、宗教与族群多元。
socialStructure.en: Society was highly stratified, composed of court nobles, jagirdars, religious elites, urban merchants, artisans, peasants, and dependent rural laborers; it was both urban and rural, with marked linguistic, religious, and ethnic diversity.

rulingClass.zh: 以尼扎姆家族、穆斯林宫廷贵族、佩加家族、高级军政官员及部分大地主为核心的统治阶层
rulingClass.en: The ruling class centered on the Nizam’s family, Muslim court nobility, the Paigah houses, senior civil-military officials, and major landed magnates

succession.zh: 王朝内部的男性世袭继承，通常由在位尼扎姆指定并获英国当局承认的继承人承袭
succession.en: Dynastic male hereditary succession, normally passing to an heir designated within the ruling house and recognized by the British authorities

structure.zh: 政权由尼扎姆统摄，中央行政通过迪万及其下属各部运作；重要决策受宫廷、贵族网络与英国驻海得拉巴代表间接影响。地方上分为直接统治区与封地辖区，行政整合程度不均。
structure.en: The state was headed by the Nizam, with central administration operating through the Diwan and subordinate departments; major decisions were shaped by the court, noble networks, and indirect influence from the British Resident at Hyderabad. Locally, authority was divided between directly administered districts and jagir territories, producing uneven administrative integration.

function.zh: 统筹政务、财政协调、法令传达及与英国驻节官的正式往来
function.en: Coordinated state administration, fiscal oversight, promulgation of orders, and formal dealings with the British Resident

function.zh: 负责地税征收、预算编制、国库管理、盐酒收入与关税类杂项收入
function.en: Handled land revenue collection, budgeting, treasury management, excise income, and miscellaneous customs-like receipts

function.zh: 管理民刑事法院、宗教法与习惯法适用、监狱及诉讼程序
function.en: Administered civil and criminal courts, application of religious and customary law, prisons, and court procedure

function.zh: 负责治安、城市秩序、情报、道路巡查及对地方骚乱的处置
function.en: Managed policing, urban order, intelligence, road patrols, and response to local disturbances

function.zh: 修筑道路、桥梁、灌溉设施、官署建筑及部分铁路配套工程
function.en: Built roads, bridges, irrigation works, government buildings, and some railway-related infrastructure

function.zh: 管理学校、翻译与印刷机构、医院、接种与公共卫生事务
function.en: Oversaw schools, translation and printing establishments, hospitals, vaccination, and public health

function.zh: 管理州军、后勤、军械库、骑兵与仪仗部队，并协调与海得拉巴特遣队相关事务
function.en: Supervised the state forces, logistics, arsenals, cavalry and ceremonial units, and coordination concerning the Hyderabad Contingent

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由地区长官、塔卢卡与村社层级构成；直接统治区征税与司法较规范，而贾吉尔封地保留较多领主权力，行政差异明显。
localAdmin.en: Local administration consisted of district officers, taluq-level authorities, and village institutions; directly ruled districts had more regular taxation and justice, while jagir territories retained greater landlord authority and showed marked administrative variation.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系兼具伊斯兰法、印度习惯法、王室敕令与近代成文规章；不同社群在婚姻继承等领域适用不同法理，刑事与行政司法逐渐制度化。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Islamic law, Indian customary law, royal decrees, and emerging modern regulations; different communities followed different legal principles in matters such as marriage and inheritance, while criminal and administrative justice became gradually more institutionalized.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政以土地税为主，辅以盐酒消费税、市场税、印花费、矿业与森林收入及各类牌照费；部分封地和贵族享有减免或中间征收权。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation rested chiefly on land revenue, supplemented by excise on salt and liquor, market dues, stamp fees, mining and forest income, and various license charges; some jagirs and noble estates enjoyed exemptions or intermediary collection rights.

religion.zh: 国家统治层以伊斯兰教逊尼派为主，但居民多数为印度教徒；此外亦有什叶派、耆那教、锡克教与基督徒社群。国家在实践中维持宗教共存，并通过宫廷赞助支持清真寺、寺庙与慈善机构。
religion.en: The ruling stratum was predominantly Sunni Muslim, while the majority of the population was Hindu; Shia communities, Jains, Sikhs, and Christians were also present. In practice the state maintained religious coexistence and patronized mosques, temples, and charitable institutions through the court.

philosophy.zh: 宫廷文化深受波斯—伊斯兰政治传统影响，同时与德干地区的印度教伦理、苏菲思想和实用行政观念交织，形成兼容并包的政治文化。
philosophy.en: Court culture was deeply shaped by Perso-Islamic political traditions, while also intersecting with Deccani Hindu ethics, Sufi thought, and pragmatic administrative ideas, creating a syncretic political culture.

writingSystem.zh: 官方与高等文化主要使用波斯字母书写的乌尔都语和波斯语传统；民间广泛使用泰卢固文、马拉地文与卡纳达文书写各地方语言。
writingSystem.en: Official and high culture chiefly employed Urdu in Perso-Arabic script alongside the Persian literary tradition; among the wider population, Telugu, Marathi, and Kannada scripts were extensively used for local languages.

culturalAchievements.zh: 海得拉巴以德干—乌尔都文学、宫廷音乐、珠宝工艺、金属器、纺织、建筑与城市景观闻名；19世纪后期在教育、印刷与医学机构方面也有显著发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Hyderabad was noted for Deccani-Urdu literature, courtly music, jewelry craftsmanship, metalwork, textiles, architecture, and urban landscapes; the late nineteenth century also saw notable development in education, printing, and medical institutions.

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言横跨印欧语系与达罗毗荼语系；宫廷与行政以乌尔都语为核心，民间广泛使用泰卢固语、马拉地语与卡纳达语。
languageFamily.en: Its principal languages spanned the Indo-European and Dravidian families; Urdu was central to court and administration, while Telugu, Marathi, and Kannada were widely spoken among the population.

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年前后的海得拉巴是南亚最富庶、规模最大的土邦之一，经济以农业为基础，同时拥有重要的手工业、城市商业和对外贸易联系。其总量在印度诸土邦中居前列，但人均收入仍受传统农业结构和地区发展不均所限制。
gdpDescription.en: Around 1900, Hyderabad was one of the largest and wealthiest princely states in South Asia, with an economy based on agriculture but also supported by important handicrafts, urban commerce, and external trade links. Its aggregate output ranked among the foremost princely states in India, though per capita income remained constrained by a traditional agrarian structure and uneven regional development.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、棉纺与织布、丝织、皮革、珠宝加工、金属工艺、林产、盐酒专卖、马匹与牲畜贸易，以及与铁路和城市建设相关的服务业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, cotton spinning and weaving, silk work, leather, jewelry processing, metal crafts, forest products, excise monopolies, horse and livestock trade, and services tied to railways and urban construction

tradeGoods.zh: 棉花、谷物、油籽、皮张、纺织品、金银珠宝、漆器、药材、林木产品及输入的机器制品、金属器和奢侈消费品
tradeGoods.en: Cotton, grain, oilseeds, hides, textiles, gold and silver jewelry, lacquerware, medicinal goods, forest products, and imported manufactured goods, metalwares, and luxury items

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。城市商人、放贷者、贵族与高官拥有显著积累，而广大农村家庭多以土地使用权、牲畜、谷物储藏和少量银饰为主要财富形式。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Urban merchants, moneylenders, nobles, and senior officials held substantial assets, while most rural households relied on land-use rights, livestock, grain stocks, and small quantities of silver ornaments as their principal wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 以农业地租和土地税为核心、辅以宫廷赞助和市场交换的半传统混合经济；在英国印度铁路、金融与贸易网络推动下，逐步融入更广泛的殖民市场体系。
economicSystem.en: A semi-traditional mixed economy centered on agrarian rents and land revenue, complemented by court patronage and market exchange; under the influence of British Indian rail, finance, and trade networks, it was increasingly integrated into the wider colonial market system.

source.en: Excise and monopolies on salt and liquor

source.zh: 关卡、印花、牌照与司法收费
source.en: Transit dues, stamps, licenses, and judicial fees

source.zh: 国有地产、矿林收入与杂项
source.en: State domains, mines, forests, and miscellaneous receipts

category.en: Court, noble stipends, and ceremonial expenditure

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库较为充实，部分储备以金银、铸币、票据和可迅速变现的财政存款形式保有。由于尼扎姆宫廷长期积累财富，海得拉巴在印度土邦中财政信誉较高。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was comparatively strong, with reserves held in specie, coinage, notes, and readily realizable fiscal deposits. Owing to the long accumulation of wealth by the Nizam’s court, Hyderabad enjoyed relatively high fiscal credibility among the princely states of India.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体审慎，强调维持宫廷威望、军警支出与基础工程之间的平衡；在稳定局势下倾向保持小额盈余，并逐步改善征收效率而非进行激进税制改革。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally cautious, aiming to balance court prestige, military-police spending, and basic infrastructure; under stable conditions it favored modest surpluses and gradual improvement in collection efficiency rather than radical tax reform.

description.zh: 由州政府维持的主力地面部队，装备以步枪和少量机枪为主，训练水平参差不齐，但可承担守备、治安与有限野战任务。
description.en: The principal state-maintained land force, equipped mainly with rifles and a small number of machine guns; training was uneven, but it could perform garrison, security, and limited field duties.

description.zh: 包含传统骑兵和由贵族供养的骑队，兼具军事、警备和仪仗功能，在德干地形下仍具机动价值。
description.en: Included traditional cavalry and noble-sponsored mounted units, serving military, security, and ceremonial roles and retaining mobility value in Deccan conditions.

description.zh: 配备野战炮和守城炮，技术与组织受英国印度影响，但整体现代化程度有限。
description.en: Equipped with field and fortress guns; its technical and organizational forms were influenced by British India, though modernization remained limited.

description.zh: 负责城市秩序、边境巡查、道路治安和镇压地方骚乱，是连接军队与警察体系的关键力量。
description.en: Responsible for urban order, frontier patrol, road security, and suppression of local unrest, forming a key bridge between the army and police system.

description.zh: 由地方封地和附属势力在紧急时召集，战斗力不如常备军，但可补充守备与治安任务。
description.en: Raised from local jagirs and subordinate interests in emergencies; less effective than the standing forces, but useful for supplementary garrison and security duties.

commanderInChief.zh: 尼扎姆为名义最高统帅，日常军务由军务大臣和高级将领负责
commanderInChief.en: The Nizam was the nominal commander-in-chief, while routine military affairs were handled by the military minister and senior generals

technology.zh: 军队处于晚19世纪向近代化过渡阶段，使用后装步枪、近代火炮、电报通信和铁路运输支持，但重武器、标准化训练与工业后勤能力明显落后于英印正规军。
technology.en: The forces were in a late nineteenth-century transitional stage of modernization, using breech-loading rifles, modern artillery, telegraph communication, and railway support, but they lagged well behind the regular British Indian Army in heavy weapons, standardized training, and industrial logistics.

threats.zh: 主要威胁并非外来征服，而是内部地方骚乱、封地控制不均、财政压力及在英国宗主权框架下军权受限；对外安全基本依赖英印体系。
threats.en: Its chief threats were not foreign conquest but internal unrest, uneven control over jagir territories, fiscal pressure, and the restriction of military autonomy under British paramountcy; external security largely depended on the British Indian system.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约一千一百万，是当时印度最大的土邦之一。人口以农村居民为绝对多数，族群、语言和宗教构成多元，其中泰卢固语人口最多，另有马拉地语、卡纳达语和乌尔都语社群。
populationDescription.en: With about 11 million inhabitants, it was one of the largest princely states in India. The population was overwhelmingly rural and highly diverse in ethnicity, language, and religion, with Telugu speakers forming the largest group alongside Marathi-, Kannada-, and Urdu-speaking communities.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、佩加家族、穆斯林与印度教大地主、高级官员和富商；中层包括小地主、文书、教师、军官、商人和熟练工匠；下层主要是佃农、小农、农业雇工、城市劳工及低种姓和边缘社群。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal house, Paigah families, Muslim and Hindu large landlords, senior officials, and wealthy merchants; the middle strata included small landholders, clerks, teachers, officers, traders, and skilled artisans; the lower strata were mainly tenants, small peasants, agricultural laborers, urban workers, and disadvantaged caste and marginal communities.

allies.zh: 名义上无独立军事同盟，但与英国印度及更广泛的大英帝国保持紧密从属合作关系，并与若干印度土邦维持礼仪性友好往来。
allies.en: It had no independent military alliance in the sovereign sense, but maintained a close subordinate cooperative relationship with British India and the wider British Empire, while also preserving ceremonial friendly ties with several Indian princely states.

enemies.zh: 无明确外部敌国；主要政治压力来自英国对其外交和军务的限制，以及内部既得利益集团之间的竞争。
enemies.en: It had no clear external enemy state; its principal political pressures came from British restrictions on its diplomacy and military affairs, as well as competition among internal vested interests.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策实际上受英国宗主权严格约束，海得拉巴主要追求维护王朝地位、扩大在帝国内的声望、争取内部自治空间，并避免与英方发生正面冲突。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was in practice tightly constrained by British paramountcy; Hyderabad chiefly sought to preserve dynastic standing, enhance prestige within the imperial order, secure room for internal autonomy, and avoid direct confrontation with British authorities.

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路与电报连接、近代铸币与财政管理、公共工程、水利、医院与接种制度、近代学校教育，以及有限引进的机械制造和军械技术
keyInnovations.en: Railway and telegraph connections, modern minting and fiscal administration, public works, irrigation, hospitals and vaccination, modern schooling, and limited imported mechanical and armament technologies

strengths.zh: 幅员广大、人口众多、财政基础较稳、宫廷财富丰厚、首都商业文化发达，并在英国印度体系内享有较高地位和相对广泛的内政自主权。
strengths.en: Its strengths were large territory, a substantial population, a comparatively stable fiscal base, immense court wealth, a commercially and culturally vibrant capital, and relatively broad internal autonomy within the British Indian system.

weaknesses.zh: 行政整合不完全，封地与直属区差异显著；农业生产率有限，贫富分化明显；军队现代化不足，对外防务依赖英国；政治改革速度慢于时代变化。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included incomplete administrative integration, stark differences between jagir and directly ruled areas, limited agricultural productivity, pronounced inequality, insufficient military modernization, dependence on Britain for external defense, and a pace of political reform slower than the changing times.

outlook.zh: 1900年的海得拉巴处于稳定而谨慎的高峰期。短期内在英国保护下仍将维持繁荣与王朝威望，但长期前景取决于能否推进财政、教育、司法和地方行政改革，并适应印度民族政治与现代国家化趋势。
outlook.en: In 1900 Hyderabad stood at a stable and cautious high point. In the short term it was likely to preserve prosperity and dynastic prestige under British protection, but its long-term outlook depended on whether it could advance fiscal, educational, judicial, and local administrative reform and adapt to the rise of Indian mass politics and modern state formation.

description.zh: 英属印度下最大且最重要的土邦之一，保有广泛内部自治。
description.en: One of the largest and most important princely states under British India, retaining broad internal autonomy.

governmentForm.zh: 立宪君主制下的帝国政府，天皇为国家元首，内阁与帝国议会在《大日本帝国宪法》框架下运作，但实际权力高度集中于元老、军部高层与官僚体系
governmentForm.en: An imperial government under a constitutional monarchy, with the Emperor as head of state and the cabinet and Imperial Diet operating under the Meiji Constitution, though real power remained highly concentrated among the genro, senior military leaders, and the bureaucratic establishment

socialStructure.zh: 社会已由封建身分制转向近代阶层社会，旧武士阶层在法律上被废除，但其成员大量进入官僚、军队、教育与实业领域；农村农民仍占多数，城市商人、工人、企业家与专业人士迅速增长
socialStructure.en: Society had shifted from a feudal status order toward a modern class society. The old samurai estate had been legally abolished, but many former samurai entered the bureaucracy, military, education, and business. Peasants still formed the majority, while urban merchants, workers, entrepreneurs, and professionals were growing rapidly

rulingClass.zh: 皇室、元老、华族、高级官僚、陆海军将领以及与国家联系紧密的新兴财阀精英
rulingClass.en: The imperial family, genro, kazoku nobility, senior bureaucrats, army and navy commanders, and emerging zaibatsu elites closely tied to the state

succession.zh: 皇位依皇室世袭继承，原则上由男性皇族按皇统顺序继位
succession.en: The throne was hereditary within the imperial house, in principle passing through the male imperial line according to dynastic order

structure.zh: 1900年的日本中央政府以天皇为名义最高主权者，由内阁总理大臣领导内阁，下设各省；帝国议会由贵族院与众议院组成，拥有立法与预算审议权，但政府对军部和官僚机构的控制更为关键。地方实行府县制，由中央任命知事监督行政
structure.en: In 1900 Japan's central government formally centered on the Emperor as sovereign, with the Prime Minister leading a cabinet over the ministries. The Imperial Diet, composed of the House of Peers and House of Representatives, exercised legislative and budgetary review powers, but effective control of the military and bureaucracy was more decisive. Locally, the prefectural system operated under governors appointed by the center

function.zh: 负责地方行政、警察、公共秩序、神社事务、卫生、土木与选举监督，是中央控制地方社会的重要机关
function.en: Handled local administration, police, public order, shrine affairs, public health, civil engineering, and election supervision, serving as a key organ of central control over local society

function.zh: 负责国家预算、税收、国债、货币制度、海关与国库管理
function.en: Managed the national budget, taxation, public debt, the currency system, customs, and the treasury

function.zh: 负责陆军行政、征兵、军需、驻屯与陆军官僚体系管理
function.en: Oversaw army administration, conscription, supply, garrisons, and the army's bureaucratic system

function.zh: 负责舰队行政、造舰、海军基地、军官培养与海防事务
function.en: Oversaw fleet administration, shipbuilding, naval bases, officer training, and maritime defense

function.zh: 负责条约谈判、驻外使领馆、列强关系与对朝鲜、中国及列岛周边事务
function.en: Handled treaty negotiations, foreign legations and consulates, relations with the great powers, and affairs involving Korea, China, and surrounding maritime regions

function.zh: 负责学校体系、师范教育、帝国大学、教科书与国家意识形态教育
function.en: Managed the school system, teacher training, imperial universities, textbooks, and state ideological education

function.zh: 负责法院行政、检察体系、监狱与法典实施
function.en: Handled court administration, the procuracy system, prisons, and implementation of legal codes

function.zh: 负责农业改良、工业振兴、矿业、商业监管、专利与出口促进
function.en: Oversaw agricultural improvement, industrial promotion, mining, commercial regulation, patents, and export promotion

localAdmin.zh: 全国划分为府、县，由中央政府任命知事；其下有郡、町、村等地方单位。地方议会存在但权力有限，警察和税务体系高度中央集权
localAdmin.en: The country was divided into fu and ken prefectures governed by centrally appointed governors; below them were districts, towns, and villages. Local assemblies existed but had limited power, while police and tax administration remained highly centralized

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以欧陆法尤其德国法和法国法为蓝本，已建立近代刑法、商法与民事制度，法院体系逐步专业化，但仍强调国家权威与治安秩序
legalSystem.en: The legal system was modeled largely on continental European law, especially German and French influences, with modern criminal, commercial, and civil institutions in place. The court system was becoming professionalized, though it still strongly emphasized state authority and public order

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以地租税为传统核心，同时关税、酒税、营业税、印花税与消费税的重要性上升。工业化与战争支出推动国家更多依赖间接税和公债融资
taxationSystem.en: Taxation still rested traditionally on the land tax, while customs duties, liquor taxes, business taxes, stamp taxes, and other indirect levies were growing in importance. Industrialization and war expenditure pushed the state toward heavier use of indirect taxes and public debt finance

religion.zh: 国家神道、佛教与儒家伦理并存。国家通过神社体系强化忠君爱国意识，而民间宗教生活仍深受佛教宗派、地方信仰与祖先祭祀影响
religion.en: State Shinto, Buddhism, and Confucian ethics coexisted. The state used the shrine system to reinforce loyalty to the emperor and patriotism, while popular religious life remained deeply shaped by Buddhist sects, local cults, and ancestor veneration

philosophy.zh: 官方思想强调忠孝、国家主义、皇室神圣性与富国强兵；知识界则并行吸收儒学、国学、自由民权思想、社会进化论与西方近代法政观念
philosophy.en: Official thought emphasized loyalty, filiality, statism, the sacred status of the imperial house, and national enrichment and military strength. Intellectual circles simultaneously absorbed Confucianism, nativist scholarship, liberal-rights thought, social Darwinism, and modern Western legal and political ideas

writingSystem.zh: 采用汉字与假名并用的日文书写体系，官方文书与教育逐渐标准化，近代印刷出版高度发达
writingSystem.en: Japanese writing used a mixed system of kanji and kana, with official documents and education becoming increasingly standardized and modern print publication highly developed

culturalAchievements.zh: 明治时期在教育普及、近代报刊、文学革新、宪政思想传播、军乐与西洋音乐引入、近代建筑、铁路与都市文化方面成就显著，同时形成将传统和风与西方制度技术结合的独特近代国民文化
culturalAchievements.en: The Meiji period achieved major advances in mass education, modern newspapers, literary reform, constitutional thought, military and Western music, modern architecture, railways, and urban culture, while creating a distinctive modern national culture that blended Japanese traditions with Western institutions and technology

languageFamily.zh: 日语，通常归为日本语系
languageFamily.en: Japanese, generally classified in the Japonic language family

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年前后的日本经济已进入快速工业化阶段，仍以农业人口为主，但纺织、采矿、航运、军需制造和铁路建设增长极快。按亚洲标准属于高动员、高增长的近代化经济体，但人均收入仍显著低于英国和美国等成熟工业国
gdpDescription.en: By around 1900 the Japanese economy had entered a phase of rapid industrialization. It remained predominantly agrarian in population, but textiles, mining, shipping, military manufacturing, and railway construction were expanding very quickly. By Asian standards it was a highly mobilized, fast-growing modernizing economy, though per capita income still lagged well behind mature industrial powers such as Britain and the United States

mainIndustries.zh: 水稻农业、蚕丝与生丝出口、棉纺织、造船、煤矿、铜矿、铁路、军工、渔业、银行与海运
mainIndustries.en: Rice agriculture, sericulture and raw silk exports, cotton textiles, shipbuilding, coal mining, copper mining, railways, armaments, fisheries, banking, and maritime shipping

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以生丝、茶、纺织品、煤和海产品为主；进口以原棉、机械、铁钢、军械原料、石油、糖与部分工业设备为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports centered on raw silk, tea, textiles, coal, and marine products; imports focused on raw cotton, machinery, iron and steel, military materials, petroleum, sugar, and industrial equipment

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异显著。农村小农多拥有有限土地或租佃权，易受地租、债务与歉收冲击；城市商人、地主、官僚和财阀相关阶层财富积累迅速。储蓄习惯正在形成，但多数家庭仍接近生计边缘
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied sharply. Rural smallholders often possessed limited land or tenancy rights and were vulnerable to rents, debt, and bad harvests; urban merchants, landlords, bureaucrats, and strata linked to the zaibatsu accumulated wealth rapidly. Savings habits were developing, but most households still lived near subsistence margins

economicSystem.zh: 国家引导型资本主义。政府通过银行、补贴、军需采购、铁路、教育和法律改革推动工业化，同时私营财阀集团在重工业、金融和贸易中迅速扩张
economicSystem.en: State-guided capitalism. The government promoted industrialization through banks, subsidies, military procurement, railways, education, and legal reform, while private zaibatsu groups expanded rapidly in heavy industry, finance, and commerce

source.en: State enterprise income and other receipts

category.en: Public works, railways, and industrial promotion

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库在甲午战争后获得清朝赔款与国际借款支持，财政基础较幕末显著增强，但大规模军备、铁路扩张和工业政策使财政长期承压，赤字与债务并存
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury had been strengthened by the indemnity from Qing China after the Sino-Japanese War and by access to international borrowing, but large-scale armament, railway expansion, and industrial policy placed long-term pressure on public finance, leaving deficits and debt alongside improved state capacity

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以强国建设为核心，优先保障军费、教育、基础设施和产业扶植；在收入不足时依靠增税、国债与外债筹资，整体上偏重国家动员而非福利支出
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on national strengthening, prioritizing military budgets, education, infrastructure, and industrial promotion. When revenues proved insufficient, the state relied on higher taxes, domestic bonds, and foreign borrowing; overall it favored national mobilization rather than welfare spending

description.zh: 以普遍征兵制为基础，按师团编制组织，装备近代步枪、炮兵和工兵单位，军官团受德式训练影响深刻，是日本大陆政策与对外扩张的主力
description.en: Based on universal conscription and organized around divisional structures, it fielded modern rifles, artillery, and engineer units. Its officer corps was deeply shaped by German-style training and it served as the main instrument of Japan's continental policy and external expansion

description.zh: 以英国海军模式建设，拥有装甲巡洋舰、战列舰和鱼雷艇等近代舰艇，依托横须贺、吴、佐世保等军港，重视决战舰队与海上交通保护
description.en: Built largely on the British naval model, it possessed modern battleships, armored cruisers, and torpedo craft, operating from naval bases such as Yokosuka, Kure, and Sasebo, with emphasis on fleet action and protection of sea communications

description.zh: 负责军事警察、后方治安、港湾与要塞防卫，并在台湾等殖民地承担警备任务
description.en: Responsible for military policing, rear-area security, harbor and fortress defense, and security duties in colonies such as Taiwan

commanderInChief.zh: 明治天皇（名义统帅）；陆军由陆军大臣与参谋本部、海军由海军大臣与军令机构实际指挥
commanderInChief.en: Emperor Meiji (nominal supreme commander); the army was effectively directed by the Army Minister and General Staff, and the navy by the Navy Minister and naval command authorities

technology.zh: 军队装备无烟火药步枪、速射炮、现代炮兵测距技术、装甲舰、蒸汽动力舰艇、电报通信与军医体系。虽然重工业基础仍不及欧洲列强，但军事组织、训练和海军造舰能力已跻身世界前列的第二梯队
technology.en: The armed forces used smokeless-powder rifles, quick-firing artillery, modern range-finding methods, armored warships, steam-powered vessels, telegraph communications, and organized military medicine. Though the heavy industrial base still trailed the leading European powers, military organization, training, and naval construction had already placed Japan in the upper second rank of world powers

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自俄罗斯帝国在满洲与朝鲜的扩张，以及中国沿海与朝鲜半岛局势的不稳定；同时日本也警惕英国、德国、法国和美国在东亚海域的势力竞争
threats.en: The principal threat came from Russian expansion in Manchuria and Korea, along with instability on the Chinese coast and the Korean Peninsula. Japan also watched the competing influence of Britain, Germany, France, and the United States in East Asian waters

populationDescription.zh: 人口约四千四百万，集中分布于本州、九州、四国与北海道开发区，台湾已于1895年后纳入帝国统治但尚未完全融入本土统计。人口增长较快，对土地、粮食与就业形成压力，也为征兵、工厂劳动与海外移民提供人力
populationDescription.en: The population was about 44 million, concentrated in Honshu, Kyushu, Shikoku, and the developing areas of Hokkaido. Taiwan had come under imperial rule after 1895 but was not yet fully integrated into home-island statistical treatment. Rapid population growth put pressure on land, food supply, and employment, while also providing manpower for conscription, factory labor, and overseas migration

socialClasses.zh: 主要包括皇族与华族、官僚与军官、地主与富农、城市商人和企业家、工厂工人、手工业者、渔民、普通农民与佃农。法律上的士农工商等级已废除，但旧士族出身在国家机构中仍占优势
socialClasses.en: Major social strata included the imperial and noble houses, bureaucrats and officers, landlords and prosperous farmers, urban merchants and entrepreneurs, factory workers, artisans, fishermen, ordinary peasants, and tenants. The old formal status order had been abolished, but people of former samurai background still held disproportionate influence in state institutions

allies.zh: 1900年尚无正式全面军事同盟，但与英国关系显著改善，并在义和团事变中与列强合作；与美国维持重要贸易关系
allies.en: In 1900 Japan had no formal full military alliance yet, but relations with Britain had improved markedly, and Japan cooperated with the powers during the Boxer crisis; it also maintained important trade relations with the United States

enemies.zh: 无正式宣战中的主要敌国，但与俄罗斯帝国在朝鲜和满洲问题上的战略对立日益尖锐；日本亦对清朝的衰弱和列强在中国的争夺保持高度警惕
enemies.en: It had no major formal wartime enemy in 1900, but strategic rivalry with the Russian Empire over Korea and Manchuria was becoming increasingly sharp. Japan also remained highly alert to Qing weakness and to great-power competition in China

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交方针以修约成功后的列强化为目标，追求在东亚取得与西方帝国同等地位，保护朝鲜半岛利益，巩固台湾统治，扩大在中国沿海与满洲的影响，并以海军建设与国际协商并用的方式维护国家安全
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed at achieving full great-power status after treaty revision, securing interests on the Korean Peninsula, consolidating rule over Taiwan, expanding influence along the Chinese coast and in Manchuria, and preserving national security through a combination of naval expansion and international diplomacy

keyInnovations.zh: 铁路网扩展、电报与电话、近代兵工厂、蒸汽轮船、近代纺织机械、现代银行制度、师范与大学教育、港口改良、近代造船与兵器生产、卫生制度和警察体系
keyInnovations.en: Railway expansion, telegraph and telephone networks, modern arsenals, steam shipping, modern textile machinery, a modern banking system, teacher-training and university education, port improvement, modern shipbuilding and arms production, public health institutions, and a modern police system

strengths.zh: 国家动员力强，中央集权有效，教育扩展迅速，陆海军近代化成功，工业增长快，财政与金融体系较亚洲多数国家更稳健，且在甲午战争后国际地位明显上升
strengths.en: Its strengths included strong state mobilization, effective centralization, rapidly expanding education, successful army and navy modernization, fast industrial growth, and fiscal and financial institutions more robust than those of most Asian states, along with a markedly enhanced international position after the Sino-Japanese War

weaknesses.zh: 资源基础不足，仍高度依赖粮食稳定与原料进口；城乡差距、农民负担和劳工问题突出；政党政治尚不稳固，军部自主性强，重军备与对外扩张可能给财政和社会带来长期压力
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included a limited resource base, continued dependence on stable food production and imported raw materials, sharp rural-urban inequality, peasant burdens, and labor problems. Party politics remained fragile, military autonomy was strong, and heavy armament and overseas expansion could impose long-term fiscal and social strain

outlook.zh: 1900年的日本前景总体上升，极可能继续跻身世界强国之列，并在朝鲜、满洲和中国东北方向采取更积极政策；若能维持财政、工业与外交平衡，其国力将进一步跃升，但与俄罗斯的冲突风险正在迅速增加
outlook.en: Japan's overall trajectory in 1900 was upward, and it was highly likely to continue rising into the ranks of world powers while pursuing more assertive policies toward Korea, Manchuria, and northeastern China. If it could maintain a balance among finance, industry, and diplomacy, its power would increase further, but the risk of conflict with Russia was rising rapidly

description.zh: 迅速工业化并跻身列强之列的东亚帝国，正在扩大其区域影响力。
description.en: A rapidly industrializing East Asian empire and rising great power expanding its regional influence.

governmentForm.zh: 英帝国殖民地帝国行政体制，由英国王室主权、伦敦印度事务决策机构、驻印总督以及各省行政机关与附庸土邦共同组成
governmentForm.en: An imperial colonial administrative system under British Crown sovereignty, with policy directed from London through the India Office, implemented by the Viceroy in India, and sustained through provincial administrations and subordinate princely states

socialStructure.zh: 社会结构高度分层，由英国殖民官员与欧洲侨民居于顶层，其下为土邦王公、地主、商人、专业中产阶层、城市工人和广大农村农民；种姓、宗教、地区与语言差异深刻影响社会地位与政治动员
socialStructure.en: Society was highly stratified, with British colonial officials and European residents at the top, followed by princes, landlords, merchants, professional middle classes, urban laborers, and the vast rural peasantry; caste, religion, region, and language strongly shaped status and political mobilization

rulingClass.zh: 英国殖民官僚、驻印军政高层、印度文官系统精英，以及与殖民政权合作的土邦君主、大地主和商业寡头
rulingClass.en: The British colonial bureaucracy, senior military and executive officials in India, the elite of the Indian Civil Service, and collaborating princely rulers, large landlords, and commercial magnates

succession.zh: 印度皇位依英国王位继承法转移；殖民行政首脑由英国政府任命，土邦则依各自王朝世袭并受英国宗主权约束
succession.en: The imperial title over India passed according to British succession law; the colonial executive was appointed by the British government, while princely states followed their own hereditary dynastic succession under British paramountcy

structure.zh: 1900年的英属印度由伦敦的印度事务大臣与印度委员会制定总体政策，印度总督兼总督会议负责在地统治。行政上包括孟加拉、马德拉斯、孟买、西北边境相关地区、旁遮普、联合省、中央省、缅甸、阿萨姆等省份，以及数百个受保护但内部自治程度不一的土邦
structure.en: In 1900 British India was governed through the Secretary of State for India and Council of India in London, with the Viceroy and his Executive Council exercising authority on the ground. Administratively it comprised major provinces such as Bengal, Madras, Bombay, Punjab, the United Provinces, the Central Provinces, Burma, Assam, and frontier territories, alongside hundreds of princely states under varying degrees of protected internal autonomy

function.zh: 统筹行政命令、治安、政治监控、监狱、公共秩序与中央文书事务
function.en: Coordinated executive orders, internal administration, policing, political surveillance, prisons, public order, and central secretariat functions

function.zh: 负责预算、土地收入、盐税、关税、货币、债务与会计审计
function.en: Managed budgets, land revenue, salt taxation, customs, currency, debt, and accounting oversight

function.zh: 处理印度军队编制、边防、军需、兵站与与英国陆军的协调
function.en: Handled the organization of the Indian Army, frontier defense, logistics, supply, and coordination with the British Army

function.zh: 建设铁路、运河、桥梁、港口、道路、政府建筑与灌溉设施
function.en: Built railways, canals, bridges, ports, roads, government buildings, and irrigation works

function.zh: 负责成文法、法院体系、法令起草与殖民法理解释
function.en: Oversaw codified law, the court system, drafting of legislation, and interpretation of colonial jurisprudence

name.en: Department of Agriculture, Commerce, and Industry

function.zh: 处理农政统计、商品作物、对外贸易、矿业、工厂和经济调查
function.en: Managed agricultural statistics, cash crops, foreign trade, mining, factories, and economic surveys

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以省督、专员、地区长官和县级征收官为骨架，核心执行者为印度文官系统成员。乡村层面依靠村社首领、地主、税务中介和警察网络；土邦由各邦统治者治理，但设有英国驻扎官监督外交、继承与重大政治事务
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized through provincial governors or lieutenant-governors, commissioners, district officers, and collectors, with the Indian Civil Service forming the core executive cadre. At the village level rule relied on headmen, landlords, revenue intermediaries, and police networks; princely states were governed by their own rulers but supervised by British Residents in matters of diplomacy, succession, and major political affairs

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为英国殖民成文法、普通法原则与经编纂的印度刑法、民事程序法、刑事程序法相结合，同时在婚姻、继承等领域保留印度教法与伊斯兰法的人身法体系。高等法院与地方法院并存，司法形式较现代化但在种族和政治案件中明显偏向殖民权力
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British colonial statutes, common-law principles, and codified Indian law such as the Penal Code and civil and criminal procedure codes, while retaining Hindu and Muslim personal law in matters like marriage and inheritance. High courts and lower courts coexisted, producing a relatively modern judicial framework that nonetheless favored colonial authority in racial and political cases

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以土地收入为传统核心，并辅以盐税、鸦片收入、消费税、关税、印花税、铁路收益和林业收入。不同地区实行柴明达里制、莱特瓦里制与马哈尔瓦里制等土地征收方式，税负在农村社会中普遍沉重
taxationSystem.en: Taxation rested historically on land revenue, supplemented by the salt tax, opium revenue, excise duties, customs, stamp duties, railway income, and forest receipts. Different regions operated under zamindari, ryotwari, and mahalwari land systems, and the rural tax burden was widely felt as heavy

religion.zh: 英属印度宗教极为多元，印度教为多数信仰，伊斯兰教构成最大少数宗教，同时还有锡克教、佛教、耆那教、祆教、基督教、犹太教以及众多地方信仰。殖民统治在形式上宣称宗教中立，但宗教分类、人口普查与代表制度逐渐强化了社群边界
religion.en: British India was religiously diverse, with Hinduism as the majority faith and Islam the largest minority religion, alongside Sikhism, Buddhism, Jainism, Zoroastrianism, Christianity, Judaism, and many local traditions. Colonial rule formally claimed religious neutrality, yet census categories and representational practices increasingly sharpened communal boundaries

philosophy.zh: 思想领域并存着印度古典哲学传统、伊斯兰学术传统、维多利亚时代自由主义、功利主义、基督教传教思想和新兴民族主义。孟加拉文艺复兴、社会改革运动与教育扩张推动了现代政治意识与公共讨论
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined classical Indian philosophical traditions, Islamic scholarship, Victorian liberalism, utilitarianism, missionary Christianity, and rising nationalism. The Bengal Renaissance, social reform movements, and educational expansion fostered modern political consciousness and a widening public sphere

writingSystem.zh: 书写体系高度多样，包括英语拉丁字母，以及天城文、孟加拉文、古木基文、古吉拉特文、泰米尔文、泰卢固文、卡纳达文、马拉雅拉姆文、乌尔都波斯-阿拉伯字母等多种文字
writingSystem.en: The writing systems were highly diverse, including English in the Latin alphabet and numerous South Asian scripts such as Devanagari, Bengali, Gurmukhi, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, and Urdu in the Perso-Arabic script

culturalAchievements.zh: 19世纪末的英属印度在文学、新闻出版、大学教育、社会改革与艺术复兴方面成就显著。罗宾德拉纳特·泰戈尔等知识分子活跃，印刷媒体迅速发展，孟买与加尔各答成为戏剧、音乐、绘画与政治言论的重要中心
culturalAchievements.en: By the late nineteenth century British India had achieved major developments in literature, journalism, university education, social reform, and artistic revival. Intellectuals such as Rabindranath Tagore were active, the print press expanded rapidly, and cities like Bombay and Calcutta became major centers of theater, music, painting, and political discourse

languageFamily.zh: 语言主要属于印欧语系印度-伊朗语支与达罗毗荼语系，另有汉藏语系、南亚语系及其他区域语言；英语在行政、高等教育与精英政治中具有关键地位
languageFamily.en: Languages primarily belonged to the Indo-European Indo-Iranian branch and the Dravidian family, alongside Sino-Tibetan, Austroasiatic, and other regional languages; English held a crucial role in administration, higher education, and elite politics

gdpDescription.zh: 英属印度是世界上人口最多、规模最大的殖民经济体之一，总量庞大但人均产出偏低。其经济以农业和原料出口为主，铁路、港口和商业金融体系较发达，但工业化高度不均衡，财富大量外流至帝国中心
gdpDescription.en: British India was one of the world's largest and most populous colonial economies, vast in aggregate output but low in per capita productivity. Its economy centered on agriculture and raw-material exports, with relatively advanced rail, port, and commercial-financial systems, yet industrialization was uneven and significant wealth drained toward the imperial metropole

mainIndustries.zh: 主要产业包括稻米、小麦、棉花、黄麻、茶叶、靛蓝、鸦片、甘蔗等农业与种植业，另有棉纺、黄麻纺织、煤矿、铁路运输、港口装卸、手工业、金融贸易与初步钢铁工业
mainIndustries.en: Major industries included rice, wheat, cotton, jute, tea, indigo, opium, and sugar cultivation, along with cotton textiles, jute milling, coal mining, railway transport, port handling, handicrafts, commercial finance, and an emerging iron and steel sector

tradeGoods.zh: 出口品以原棉、黄麻及黄麻制品、茶叶、鸦片、谷物、皮革、油籽、棉纱和部分纺织品为主；进口品包括英国棉织品、机械、金属制品、铁路设备、奢侈消费品和部分工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Exports consisted chiefly of raw cotton, jute and jute goods, tea, opium, grains, leather, oilseeds, cotton yarn, and some textiles; imports included British cotton manufactures, machinery, metal goods, railway equipment, luxury consumer goods, and certain industrial materials

householdWealth.zh: 普通家庭财富普遍有限，农村家庭多以土地占有、牲畜、粮食储备和首饰形式保存价值；城市商人、地主和金融中介拥有较高财富，而广大农民易受歉收、债务与税负冲击
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally modest, with rural families storing value in land rights, livestock, grain reserves, and jewelry; urban merchants, landlords, and financiers held much greater wealth, while most peasants remained vulnerable to harvest failure, debt, and taxation

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度属于殖民资本主义与帝国自由贸易框架下的混合体，由国家税收、铁路投资、出口导向型农业、私人商社和印度本地商业网络共同运作。市场化程度较高，但政策优先服务于帝国战略与英国工业利益
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a colonial capitalist order within an imperial free-trade framework, combining state taxation, railway investment, export-oriented agriculture, private firms, and Indian commercial networks. It was relatively marketized, but policy priorities served imperial strategy and British industrial interests

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库保持相对稳健，但财政结构对土地税、间接税和帝国贸易十分依赖。边防战争、饥荒救济、汇率波动和公共工程借款会显著影响预算平衡
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained relatively sound, but the fiscal structure depended heavily on land taxation, indirect taxes, and imperial trade. Frontier wars, famine relief, exchange-rate fluctuations, and borrowing for public works could significantly affect budget balance

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调收支平衡、维持信用、保障军费与基础设施投资，同时把税负稳定地转嫁给农村和消费领域。整体上偏保守，优先满足帝国治理与战略安全，而非社会福利扩张
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized balanced budgets, creditworthiness, military provision, and infrastructure investment, while steadily placing tax burdens on the countryside and mass consumption. It was broadly conservative, prioritizing imperial governance and strategic security over social welfare expansion

description.zh: 由英军部队与大量印度籍部队组成，是边境防御、内部镇压与海外帝国行动的主力，重点部署于旁遮普、西北边境、省会和关键交通节点
description.en: Composed of British units and large numbers of Indian troops, it formed the main force for frontier defense, internal suppression, and overseas imperial operations, with concentrations in Punjab, the North-West Frontier, provincial centers, and key transport nodes

name.en: Princely State Forces and Auxiliary Troops

description.zh: 由各土邦维持，训练和装备水平不一，主要用于地方守备、仪仗和有限战时支援，受英国监督与整编
description.en: Maintained by princely states, these forces varied widely in training and equipment and were used mainly for local garrison, ceremonial roles, and limited wartime support under British supervision

name.zh: 边防准军事与宪兵部队
name.en: Frontier Paramilitary and Military Police Forces

description.zh: 包括边境侦察、山地警备和宪兵性质武装，用于部族地区巡逻、交通线保护和治安行动
description.en: These included frontier scouts, mountain security formations, and military police units employed in tribal patrols, line-of-communication protection, and security operations

commanderInChief.zh: 印度总司令
commanderInChief.en: Commander-in-Chief, India

technology.zh: 军队装备总体处于19世纪末现代化水平，使用无烟火药步枪、现代野战炮、马克沁机枪、铁路动员、电报通信和蒸汽运输体系，但机械化尚未出现，补给与卫生条件在边境作战中仍受限制
technology.en: The armed forces operated at a late nineteenth-century modern level, using smokeless-powder rifles, modern field artillery, Maxim guns, railway mobilization, telegraph communications, and steam transport, though mechanization had not yet emerged and logistics and medical conditions remained constrained in frontier warfare

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西北边境部族冲突、阿富汗方向的不稳定，以及与俄罗斯帝国在中亚长期战略竞争所形成的“大战略焦虑”；此外还需防范内部民族主义政治动员和局部骚乱
threats.en: Primary threats came from tribal conflict on the North-West Frontier, instability in the Afghan direction, and the long strategic anxiety generated by rivalry with the Russian Empire in Central Asia; internal nationalist mobilization and localized unrest also required constant attention

populationDescription.zh: 1900年的英属印度约有2.9亿人口，是世界上人口最庞大的政治实体之一。人口高度集中于恒河平原、孟加拉三角洲、旁遮普灌溉区、德干高原农业带和南印度沿海地带，但地区间密度、粮食安全和卫生状况差异极大
populationDescription.en: In 1900 British India had about 290 million people, making it one of the most populous political entities in the world. Population was concentrated in the Gangetic plain, the Bengal delta, the irrigated Punjab, the agricultural Deccan, and the coasts of southern India, though density, food security, and public health varied enormously by region

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括英国官员与侨民、土邦王公、扎明达尔与大地主、银行家与商人、受西式教育的专业中产阶层、文书与教师、工厂工人、城市贫民以及占绝大多数的佃农、自耕农和无地劳工。种姓等级、宗教身份和部族归属与经济阶层交错重叠
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included British officials and expatriates, princely elites, zamindars and large landlords, bankers and merchants, western-educated professionals, clerks and teachers, factory workers, the urban poor, and the overwhelming mass of tenants, peasant proprietors, and landless laborers. Caste rank, religious identity, and tribal affiliation overlapped with economic class in complex ways

allies.zh: 作为大英帝国的核心殖民地，英属印度实际上与英国本土及帝国内其他属地利益一致，并与受英国影响的土邦、阿曼湾和波斯湾若干保护地维持协作关系
allies.en: As a core colony of the British Empire, British India was aligned with Britain itself and wider imperial possessions, and maintained cooperative ties with princely states and several British-protected polities around the Arabian Sea and Persian Gulf

enemies.zh: 没有正式全面战争中的直接敌国，但战略上主要戒备俄罗斯帝国在中亚的推进，以及阿富汗边境的不稳定势力；在经济和海权层面也关注法国、德国等列强竞争
enemies.en: It had no direct enemy in a formal general war, but strategically it chiefly guarded against Russian expansion in Central Asia and instability along the Afghan frontier; it also monitored competition from powers such as France and Germany in economic and maritime terms

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策由伦敦决定，英属印度主要承担帝国亚洲战略支点角色，重点在于确保印度洋航线安全、控制西北边防、维护对周边缓冲地带的影响，并通过贸易、驻扎官和军事威慑巩固英帝国在南亚和印度洋的主导地位
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy was made in London, with British India serving as the principal imperial strategic base in Asia. Its priorities were securing Indian Ocean routes, controlling the northwestern frontier, maintaining influence over surrounding buffer regions, and reinforcing British predominance in South Asia and the Indian Ocean through trade, residents, and military deterrence

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度基础设施包括大规模铁路网、电报系统、蒸汽航运连接、现代港口、灌溉工程、近代兵工生产、印刷出版、人口普查、统计治理和大学教育体系。技术扩散主要服务于行政控制、军事调动和出口经济，但也为印度民族主义与社会改革提供了组织工具
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies and institutional infrastructures included a large railway network, telegraph systems, steamship links, modern ports, irrigation works, modern ordnance production, print publishing, census taking, statistical governance, and university education. Technological diffusion mainly served administrative control, military movement, and the export economy, but it also gave Indian nationalism and social reform new organizational tools

strengths.zh: 英属印度拥有庞大人口、广阔土地、丰富农业与矿产资源、发达的港口铁路体系和强大的帝国军事后盾，是英国全球力量投射与贸易网络的关键核心
strengths.en: British India possessed a vast population, extensive territory, rich agricultural and mineral resources, developed port and rail systems, and powerful imperial military backing, making it a crucial core of British global power projection and trade

weaknesses.zh: 其根本弱点在于殖民统治的合法性不足、人均贫困严重、地区与社群差异深刻、饥荒和公共卫生脆弱、财富外流明显，以及政治参与受限所激发的民族主义日益增长
weaknesses.en: Its fundamental weaknesses lay in the limited legitimacy of colonial rule, severe mass poverty, deep regional and communal divisions, vulnerability to famine and poor public health, evident wealth drainage, and growing nationalism fueled by restricted political participation

outlook.zh: 1900年的英属印度表面稳定、行政强大且财政尚可，但随着受教育阶层扩大、民族主义组织化、经济不平等持续和帝国竞争加剧，未来数十年将面临越来越强的政治改革诉求与反殖民挑战
outlook.en: In 1900 British India appeared stable, administratively powerful, and fiscally viable, yet the expansion of educated elites, the organization of nationalism, persistent inequality, and intensifying imperial rivalry meant that the coming decades would bring mounting demands for political reform and increasingly serious anti-colonial challenges

description.zh: 大英帝国最重要的殖民行政核心，统辖印度次大陆大部并依赖土邦体系。
description.en: The most important colonial core of the British Empire, ruling most of the subcontinent through direct administration and princely states.

governmentForm.zh: 满洲皇室主导的多民族世袭君主制帝国，名义上由皇帝统治，实际上在1900年由慈禧太后与军机处、总理各国事务衙门及地方督抚共同操控政务
governmentForm.en: A multiethnic hereditary imperial monarchy dominated by the Manchu Aisin-Gioro house; nominally ruled by the emperor, but in 1900 actual power was heavily exercised by Empress Dowager Cixi together with the Grand Council, the Zongli Yamen, and powerful provincial governors-general

socialStructure.zh: 社会以皇室、旗人、官绅、士人、农民、手工业者、商人、城市贫民与贱役群体构成；各地另有蒙古、回、藏、苗、维吾尔等民族社群，地方差异极大
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of the imperial house, bannermen, officials and gentry, literati, peasants, artisans, merchants, urban poor, and marginalized service groups; it also included Mongol, Hui, Tibetan, Miao, Uyghur, and many other ethnic communities with strong regional variation

rulingClass.zh: 满洲皇族、八旗上层、中央满汉大员、地方督抚、科举出身士绅与省级军政集团
rulingClass.en: The Manchu imperial clan, upper bannermen, senior Manchu and Han officials, provincial governors-general and governors, degree-holding gentry, and emerging provincial military-administrative elites

succession.zh: 皇位由爱新觉罗宗室内部继承，通常由皇帝指定嗣君并经宗室与宫廷确认；晚清时期继承深受太后、宫廷政治与宗室权力平衡影响
succession.en: The throne passed within the Aisin-Gioro imperial clan, usually through designation of an heir confirmed by the court and clan institutions; in the late Qing, succession was strongly shaped by the empress dowager, palace politics, and balances within the imperial lineage

structure.zh: 中央政府以军机处、内阁、六部、理藩院、都察院、翰林院与总理各国事务衙门为骨干，辅以宗人府及各类专门机构；地方分省、府、州、县四级，边疆则设将军、驻藏大臣与各类特别行政体制
structure.en: The central state rested on the Grand Council, Grand Secretariat, Six Ministries, Court of Colonial Affairs, Censorate, Hanlin Academy, and the Zongli Yamen, alongside the Imperial Clan Court and other specialist bodies; locally it operated through provinces, prefectures, subprefectures/departments, and counties, while frontier regions were governed through generals, resident ministers, and special arrangements

function.zh: 处理最高机密政务、军务调度、谕旨起草与朝廷决策协调，是晚清实际最高行政中枢之一
function.en: Handled top-level confidential affairs, military coordination, drafting of imperial edicts, and high policy coordination; one of the real centers of executive power in the late Qing

function.zh: 掌管官员任免、考核、升降与品级注册
function.en: Managed appointments, evaluations, promotions, demotions, and rank registration of officials

function.zh: 管理田赋、盐课、仓储、财政收支、户籍统计与部分铸币事务
function.en: Oversaw land tax, salt revenues, granaries, fiscal receipts and expenditures, household registration statistics, and some minting functions

function.zh: 主管礼仪、祭祀、朝贡、学校考试名义事务及部分对外礼宾
function.en: Supervised ritual, sacrifices, tributary protocol, nominal educational and examination matters, and some diplomatic ceremony

function.zh: 名义上管理武官任命、军籍、调兵文书与绿营制度，但实际军事权力已大量下移至地方督抚与新式军队统帅
function.en: Nominally managed military appointments, rosters, troop paperwork, and the Green Standard system, though real military authority had largely shifted to provincial governors and commanders of modernized forces

function.zh: 主管刑律、重大案件复核、监狱与司法行政
function.en: Supervised criminal law, review of major cases, prisons, and judicial administration

function.zh: 管理河工、城工、官营工程、部分军械制造与基础设施修缮
function.en: Managed river works, city construction, state projects, some ordnance production, and infrastructure repair

function.zh: 处理近代外交、条约执行、与列强交涉、使馆事务及部分洋务协调
function.en: Handled modern diplomacy, treaty implementation, negotiations with foreign powers, legation affairs, and some coordination of Self-Strengthening matters

function.zh: 管理蒙古、西藏及部分边疆民族事务
function.en: Administered Mongolian, Tibetan, and certain frontier affairs

localAdmin.zh: 全国分为二十余省，由总督、巡抚统辖，下设布政使、按察使、道、府、州、县。县为基层统治核心，依赖胥吏、里甲保甲与地方绅士维持征税、治安和司法。1900年中央控制力显著削弱，东南督抚与北方地方将领拥有极大自主性
localAdmin.en: The empire was divided into more than twenty provinces under governors-general and governors, with provincial commissioners, judicial commissioners, circuits, prefectures, departments, and counties below them. The county was the core local unit, relying on clerks, baojia/community organization, and local gentry for taxation, order, and justice. By 1900 central control had weakened markedly, while southeastern governors-general and northern regional commanders exercised considerable autonomy

legalSystem.zh: 法律以《大清律例》为基础，结合皇帝谕旨、成案和地方裁量。司法与行政高度合一，知县兼理审判。对旗人与汉民、边疆民族地区常有不同制度安排；近代条约口岸与租界内则受领事裁判权严重限制
legalSystem.en: Law was based on the Great Qing Code together with imperial edicts, precedents, and local discretion. Judicial and administrative authority remained closely fused, with magistrates serving as judges. Different arrangements often applied to bannermen, Han civilians, and frontier peoples; in treaty ports and foreign concessions, Qing jurisdiction was also sharply limited by extraterritoriality

taxationSystem.zh: 主要税源为地丁银、漕粮、盐课、关税、厘金和杂税。19世纪后期厘金和海关收入比重上升，常关税名义税率受条约限制。税收征解层层盘剥，中央依赖地方解款与海关外籍税务管理体系
taxationSystem.en: The main taxes were land tax, grain tribute, salt revenues, customs duties, likin transit taxes, and miscellaneous imposts. In the late nineteenth century likin and maritime customs became increasingly important, while nominal tariff rates were constrained by treaty obligations. Collection was burdened by multiple layers of extraction, and the center depended heavily on provincial remittances and the foreign-run customs apparatus

religion.zh: 国家意识形态以儒家正统为主，同时广泛并存佛教、道教、民间信仰、祖先崇拜、伊斯兰教、藏传佛教与基督宗教。1900年因教案与反洋教情绪高涨，宗教问题与外交冲突密切交织
religion.en: Official ideology centered on Confucian orthodoxy, while Buddhism, Daoism, popular religion, ancestor veneration, Islam, Tibetan Buddhism, and Christianity coexisted widely. In 1900 anti-missionary hostility and religious incidents strongly intertwined confessional issues with diplomatic conflict

philosophy.zh: 主流思想仍为程朱理学与经世致用传统，晚清并受今文经学、变法思想、西学、中体西用论及早期民族主义影响
philosophy.en: Mainstream thought still drew from Neo-Confucian orthodoxy and the statecraft tradition, but the late Qing was also influenced by New Text scholarship, reform thought, Western learning, the formula of 'Chinese learning as essence, Western learning for practical use,' and early nationalism

writingSystem.zh: 官方书写主要使用文言汉文，行政与民间亦广泛使用白话文体；满文仍为皇室与部分旗务机构法定文字之一，但实际使用范围已明显缩小
writingSystem.en: Official writing relied mainly on Classical Chinese, while various vernacular styles were also widely used in administration and society; Manchu remained one of the formal languages of the dynasty and banner institutions, though its practical use had contracted sharply

culturalAchievements.zh: 清代积累了庞大的经史考据学成果、官修典籍、地方志、小说戏曲、书画篆刻与宫廷工艺传统。至1900年，京剧、木版印刷、商业出版、报刊传播与翻译活动持续发展，上海等地成为新式文化中心之一
culturalAchievements.en: The Qing had produced vast achievements in classical scholarship, state-sponsored compilations, local gazetteers, fiction and drama, painting, seal art, and court craftsmanship. By 1900 Peking opera, woodblock printing, commercial publishing, newspapers, and translation activity were all developing further, with cities like Shanghai becoming major centers of new urban culture

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言属汉藏语系汉语族，帝国并存满-通古斯语、蒙古语、藏语、突厥语族诸语言及众多地方方言
languageFamily.en: The predominant languages belonged to the Sinitic branch of the Sino-Tibetan family, while the empire also encompassed Manchu-Tungusic, Mongolic, Tibetan, Turkic, and many regional speech communities

unit.en: taels of silver per person per year

gdpDescription.zh: 1900年的清帝国仍是世界人口最多、总体经济规模极大的农业文明之一，但人均产出偏低，区域差异显著。长江下游、珠江三角洲、直隶沿海和通商口岸的商业化程度较高，而广大内陆地区仍以小农经济为主。战乱、赔款压力、外资渗透和交通瓶颈严重削弱了国家财政动员能力
gdpDescription.en: In 1900 the Qing Empire remained one of the world's largest aggregate economies due to its vast population, but output per head was low and regional disparities were substantial. The lower Yangzi, Pearl River Delta, Zhili coast, and treaty ports were comparatively commercialized, while much of the interior remained dominated by smallholder agriculture. Warfare, indemnity burdens, foreign penetration, and transport constraints severely weakened the state's capacity to mobilize wealth

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、丝织、棉纺、茶叶加工、陶瓷、采矿、盐业、河运海运、传统手工业，以及有限的新式纱厂、机器修造、兵工厂和铁路建设
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, silk weaving, cotton textiles, tea processing, ceramics, mining, salt production, riverine and maritime transport, traditional handicrafts, and a limited modern sector of spinning mills, machine works, arsenals, and railway construction

tradeGoods.zh: 出口以茶叶、生丝、丝绸、豆类、皮货、瓷器及部分矿产为主；进口以棉纱、棉布、机器、金属制品、煤油、洋药和军火为主
tradeGoods.en: Exports included tea, raw silk, silk goods, beans, hides, porcelain, and some minerals; imports included cotton yarn, cotton cloth, machinery, metal goods, kerosene, foreign medicines, and arms

name.zh: 银两与制钱并行货币体系
name.en: Silver tael and copper cash dual currency system

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富高度不均，江南、广东及通商口岸商绅和地主阶层拥有显著积累，但多数农户土地不足、负债沉重，易受歉收、兵灾和税费摊派冲击
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal: merchants, gentry, and landlords in Jiangnan, Guangdong, and the treaty ports accumulated substantial assets, but most rural households had little land, carried debt, and were highly vulnerable to crop failure, warfare, and fiscal exactions

unit.en: taels of silver per worker per year
customs taels of silver per year

economicSystem.zh: 以小农土地经营和市场交换相结合的传统农业经济为主，辅以国家专卖、地方厘金、行会商业和受条约约束的半殖民地对外贸易体系；部分地区开始出现官督商办与商办近代企业
economicSystem.en: The economy was primarily a traditional agrarian market system based on smallholder landholding, supplemented by state monopolies, likin taxation, guild commerce, and a treaty-constrained semi-colonial foreign trade regime; some regions were beginning to develop state-supervised and merchant-run modern enterprises

source.en: Miscellaneous taxes, mining, and other receipts

category.en: River works, relief, and public works

category.zh: 债务、赔款预备与对外相关支付
category.en: Debt service, indemnity provisions, and foreign-related payments
Court, imperial clan, and banner stipends

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央与各省库储分散，账面储备有限，且大量款项被指定用于军费、河工、赈务和债务。1900年庚子事变爆发后，北方财政秩序急剧紊乱，北京与天津一带库藏和海关收入均受战事冲击
treasuryDescription.en: Treasury funds were fragmented between the center and the provinces, with only limited liquid reserves on paper and many monies already earmarked for military expenses, river works, relief, and debt. After the Boxer crisis erupted in 1900, fiscal order in North China deteriorated sharply, and treasuries and customs revenues around Beijing and Tianjin were disrupted by war

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持统治与应急筹款为主，重视临时加派、厘金、借款和挪用专款，缺乏统一近代预算制度。东南各省相对重视保商与维持税源，中央则在军事、宫廷和外交危机之间被动调度
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was centered on regime maintenance and emergency fund-raising, relying heavily on surcharges, likin, borrowing, and diversion of earmarked funds rather than a unified modern budget. The southeastern provinces were relatively more concerned with protecting commerce and preserving revenues, while the center reacted under pressure from military, court, and diplomatic crises

description.zh: 传统满洲、蒙古与汉军旗兵体系，政治象征意义仍大，但战斗力和训练水平普遍衰退，驻京与驻防城市为主
description.en: The traditional Manchu, Mongol, and Han banner system retained strong political symbolism, but its combat effectiveness and training had broadly declined; it was concentrated in Beijing and garrison cities

description.zh: 以汉人营兵为主的旧式地方治安与守备力量，分散于各省，负责巡缉、驻防和辅助治安，但装备陈旧、饷糈不足
description.en: An older Han-dominated provincial force used for policing, garrison duty, and local security across the provinces, but generally poorly equipped and underfunded

description.zh: 由地方督抚控制的湘军、淮军余脉及各类新旧练军构成，是晚清最重要的实战力量来源，但地域性、私属性和统属分裂严重
description.en: Composed of provincial yongying lineages such as the remnants of the Xiang and Huai armies and various trained forces, these were the most important practical fighting troops of the late Qing, though highly regionalized, personalized, and fragmented in command

description.zh: 采用较新式编制、操典和枪炮装备的部队，以袁世凯的武卫右军等北方新军最具战斗力，是清廷未来军事改革的核心雏形
description.en: Troops organized along more modern lines with updated drill and firearms, including Yuan Shikai's forces in North China; these were the most effective Qing units and the embryonic core of future military reform

description.zh: 甲午战败后北洋海军基本毁灭，残余舰船与南洋、福建、广东等水师继续存在，但规模有限、经费紧张，难以与列强海军抗衡
description.en: After defeat in the Sino-Japanese War, the Beiyang Fleet had been largely destroyed; residual naval forces and regional fleets in the south continued to exist, but were small, underfunded, and incapable of matching the great powers

commanderInChief.zh: 皇帝为名义最高统帅，实际军政主导者为慈禧太后及各省督抚、统兵大臣
commanderInChief.en: The emperor was the nominal commander-in-chief, but actual military direction lay with Empress Dowager Cixi and powerful provincial governors and field commanders

technology.zh: 军队技术处于新旧并存阶段。部分新军装备毛瑟步枪、克虏伯火炮、马克沁机枪和较现代化操典，但绝大多数旧军仍依赖落后火器、冷兵器、低效后勤与分散训练体系。铁路、电报和近代兵工虽已引入，却远未形成全国一体化军备体系
technology.en: Military technology was uneven and transitional. Some new-model troops used Mauser rifles, Krupp artillery, Maxim guns, and relatively modern drill, but most older formations still relied on obsolete firearms, edged weapons, weak logistics, and fragmented training. Railways, telegraphy, and modern arsenals had been introduced, yet had not produced an integrated national war machine

threats.zh: 1900年面临义和团运动、华北失控、八国联军干涉、俄国在满洲扩张、日本对朝鲜与华北的战略压力，以及列强在沿海和通商口岸的军事优势。内部则有地方军权坐大、财政崩溃和部队忠诚分裂等严重问题
threats.en: In 1900 the Qing faced the Boxer uprising, the breakdown of control in North China, intervention by the Eight-Nation Alliance, Russian expansion in Manchuria, Japanese strategic pressure after Korea, and overwhelming foreign naval power along the coast and treaty ports. Internally it also faced provincial militarization, fiscal breakdown, and deeply divided troop loyalties

populationDescription.zh: 清帝国人口约四亿，是当时世界人口最多的国家之一。人口主要集中于华北平原、长江流域、四川盆地、华南沿海及珠江流域，东北和西北边疆人口相对稀疏。19世纪后期长期人口压力、土地细分、灾荒与区域迁徙并存
populationDescription.en: With about 400 million people, the Qing Empire was one of the most populous states in the world. Population was concentrated in the North China Plain, the Yangzi basin, the Sichuan basin, the South China coast, and the Pearl River watershed, while Manchuria and the northwestern frontiers remained much more thinly settled. By the late nineteenth century severe demographic pressure, land subdivision, famine, and large-scale regional migration coexisted

socialClasses.zh: 传统上以士、农、工、商为理想秩序，但现实社会由皇族宗室、旗人、官员、绅士地主、佃农与自耕农、手工业者、行商坐贾、盐商票号资本、矿工码头工人、兵丁、僧道教职人员及大量边疆民族社群构成。晚清通商口岸还出现买办、工厂工人、近代学生和新式知识分子
socialClasses.en: Ideally society was framed as scholars, peasants, artisans, and merchants, but in reality it comprised the imperial clan, bannermen, officials, gentry-landlords, tenants and owner-cultivators, artisans, merchants, salt and finance capital, miners and dockworkers, soldiers, clergy, and many frontier ethnic communities. In the treaty ports the late Qing also saw compradors, factory workers, modern students, and new intellectual strata

allies.zh: 1900年清廷几乎没有可靠盟友。形式上可依赖的只有部分仍承认清朝宗主传统的边疆与藩属关系残余，但在国际政治上难以转化为有效支持。个别列强内部立场不一，东南督抚则试图通过“东南互保”避免与西方全面开战
allies.en: In 1900 the Qing court had virtually no dependable allies. Formally it could still invoke remnants of older suzerain and frontier relationships, but these had little value in international power politics. Some foreign powers differed in attitude, and the southeastern governors pursued the 'Mutual Protection of Southeast China' to avoid full-scale war with the West

enemies.zh: 主要敌对力量为入侵华北的八国联军成员国，尤其是日本、俄国、英国、德国、法国、美国、奥匈和意大利；此外还面临传教冲突引发的多国压力与列强对铁路、矿山、港口和势力范围的竞争
enemies.en: Its principal enemies were the members of the Eight-Nation Alliance intervening in North China, especially Japan, Russia, Britain, Germany, France, the United States, Austria-Hungary, and Italy; it also faced multinational pressure arising from missionary conflict and great-power competition over railways, mines, ports, and spheres of influence

foreignPolicy.zh: 晚清外交核心是在不平等条约体系下求取生存，尽量平衡列强、保全主权残余并争取时间进行有限改革。1900年政策严重分裂：中央部分主战势力支持排外与利用义和团，东南督抚则倾向保境安民、维持条约秩序与地方贸易
foreignPolicy.en: Late Qing foreign policy aimed at survival within the unequal treaty system, balancing the powers, preserving what remained of sovereignty, and buying time for limited reform. In 1900 policy became deeply divided: some at the center favored anti-foreign confrontation and the use of the Boxers, while southeastern governors preferred preserving order, treaty relations, and regional commerce

keyInnovations.zh: 已引入电报、铁路、近代兵工厂、轮船航运、机器纺织、近代矿业、海关统计、外语翻译机构与新式学堂。江南制造局、汉阳铁厂、轮船招商局和各地电报铁路建设体现了洋务运动遗产，但技术扩散有限，工业基础薄弱，制度改革滞后
keyInnovations.en: Telegraphy, railways, modern arsenals, steam shipping, machine spinning, modern mining, customs statistics, translation bureaus, and new schools had all been introduced. The Jiangnan Arsenal, Hanyang Iron Works, China Merchants Steam Navigation Company, and various telegraph and railway projects embodied the legacy of the Self-Strengthening Movement, but technological diffusion remained limited, the industrial base was weak, and institutional reform lagged

strengths.zh: 拥有庞大人口、广阔领土、深厚农业基础、成熟市场网络、丰富区域经济互补性和强大的文化整合能力；地方精英与商人阶层仍具相当资源动员潜力，若能整顿财政军政，仍具恢复能力
strengths.en: It possessed an enormous population, vast territory, a deep agrarian base, mature market networks, strong regional complementarities, and substantial cultural integrative power; provincial elites and merchant groups still retained significant mobilizational resources, giving the dynasty some capacity for recovery if fiscal and military institutions could be reformed

weaknesses.zh: 中央权威衰落，军制破碎，财政不足，法律与行政近代化迟缓，海防陆防皆弱，不平等条约束缚严重，民族与地方问题复杂，宫廷保守与改革派冲突不断。1900年义和团危机更使国家面临军事失败、外交羞辱和财政崩盘的叠加危险
weaknesses.en: Central authority was declining, the military system was fragmented, finances were inadequate, legal and administrative modernization was slow, both naval and land defense were weak, and unequal treaties imposed severe constraints; ethnic and regional issues were complex, while court conservatives and reformers remained in constant conflict. The Boxer crisis of 1900 compounded these problems with the threat of military defeat, diplomatic humiliation, and fiscal collapse

outlook.zh: 短期前景极为严峻。若北方战事失利，清廷将被迫接受更沉重赔款与外国驻兵，并进一步依赖地方督抚维系统治。然而危机也可能迫使朝廷推进新政、重建新军、改革教育与财政。若改革不足，则帝国在未来十余年内极可能走向体制性崩解
outlook.en: The short-term outlook was extremely grave. Defeat in North China would force the dynasty to accept heavier indemnities and foreign military presence while relying even more on provincial governors to sustain rule. Yet the crisis might also compel sweeping reforms in the military, education, and fiscal system. If such reforms proved insufficient, the empire was highly likely to move toward systemic collapse within the following decade

description.zh: 中国名义上的统治帝国，1900年因义和团运动与列强干涉而陷入严重危机。
description.en: The nominal ruling empire of China, plunged into severe crisis in 1900 by the Boxer Uprising and foreign intervention.

ruler.zh: 克里希纳拉贾·瓦迪亚尔四世

governmentForm.zh: 君主制土邦，在英属印度宗主权下实行受约束的藩属统治
governmentForm.en: Monarchical princely state under British Indian paramountcy with constrained subordinate rule

socialStructure.zh: 社会以乡村农业人口为主体，叠加种姓、地主、宫廷贵族、城市商人、手工业者与新兴受教育中产阶层构成；国家在传统印度社会结构之上推动官僚化与现代教育改革
socialStructure.en: Society was predominantly rural and agrarian, layered by caste, landlords, court nobility, urban merchants, artisans, and a growing educated middle class; the state pursued bureaucratic and educational modernization atop traditional Indian social structures.

rulingClass.zh: 瓦迪亚尔王室、宫廷贵族、迪万及其文官体系、地方地主与与王室合作的高种姓精英
rulingClass.en: The Wadiyar royal house, court nobility, the Diwan and civil bureaucracy, local landed elites, and high-caste notables aligned with the state

succession.zh: 王朝世袭，通常按瓦迪亚尔家族父系继承；继承须获英印政府承认
